memoryArtifacts.description: Frederick II (or III) (13 December 1272-25 June 1337) was the regent (from 1291) and subsequent King of Sicily from 1295 until his death. He was the third son of Peter III of Aragon and served in the …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile於1272年12月13日出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿時，他的父親Rey Pedro III de Aragón32歲，母親Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón24歲。他於1303年5月與Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile在義大利西西利亞梅西那結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1337年6月25日在義大利西西利亞卡坦尼亞卡坦尼亞享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile于1272年12月13日出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿时，他的父亲Rey Pedro III de Aragón32岁，母亲Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón24岁。他于1303年5月与Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile在意大利西西利亞梅西那结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1337年6月25日在意大利西西利亞卡坦尼亞卡坦尼亞享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sicily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sisley
meanings: English (Kent): from the popular Middle English female personal name Sisely (Old French Cecile, Cicile, from Latin Caecilia, feminine form of the Roman surname Caecilius, a derivative of caecus ‘blind’). This was the name of a early Christian virgin martyr of the 2nd or 3rd century, who came to be regarded as the patron saint of music. The surname is generally spelt with C- in the Middle Ages, following the trend of the personal name, and with S- in modern times. Compare Cecil and see also Sise , Sisson .

nameMeanings.name: Frederic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

en.lifeSummary: When Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile was born on 13 December 1272, in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Rey Pedro III de Aragón, was 32 and his mother, Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, was 24. He married Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile in May 1303, in Messina, Sicily, Italy. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 June 1337, in Catania, Catania, Sicily, Italy, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile est né le 13 décembre 1272, à Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Rey Pedro III de Aragón, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile en mai 1303, à Messina, Sicile, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1337, à Catania, Catania, Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile am 13. Dezember 1272 in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rey Pedro III de Aragón 32 und seine Mutter Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón 24. Er hat im Mai 1303 in Messina, Sizilien, Italien Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1337 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Catania, Catania, Sizilien, Italien.

ja.lifeSummary: Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicileが1272年12月13日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナバーセロナで生まれた時，父Rey Pedro III de Aragónは32歳，母Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragónは24歳であった。1303年5月にイタリアシシリアメシナでÉléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1337年6月25日にイタリアシシリアカタニアカタニアで64歳で死去した。

ko.Villafranca del Panadés, Barcelona, Cata: 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 빌라프랭카 데 펜드e스
ko.lifeSummary: Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile(이)가 1272년 12월 13일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 바셀나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rey Pedro III de Aragón(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1303년 5월 이탈리아 시실리야 메시나에서 Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1337년 6월 25일 이탈리아 시실리야 카탠이아 카탠이아에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile em maio de 1303, em Messina, Sicilia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frederic de Sicily II   Roi de Sicile родился 13 декабря 1272 г. в местности барселона, барселона, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Rey Pedro III de Aragón было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Constance de Sicilia reina consorte de Aragón, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Éléonore d'Anjou Reine de Sicile май 1303 г. в местности мессина, сисиля, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 июня 1337 г. в местности катаня, катаня, сисиля, Италия в возрасте 64 лет.
